purpose: Re-run of the single smoke leg that failed in smoke_results.json (S5 atom correspondence).
cause_of_prior_failure: sub2_constraints emits dyadic float literals (0.25/0.5) when oy is a sympy Symbol; the smt2 transcription uses exact rationals. Mathematically identical atoms compared unequal as sympy expressions (1.0*wax vs wax).
fix: lossless rational normalization (sympy nsimplify) before set comparison; smoke.py updated
